name: ranked-cs2-client
description: Ranked CS2 desktop client — match tracking and JSI bridge
author: sushii.dev

scripts.build: node scripts/bake-update-config.mjs && npm run build:ui && npm run build:electron && cp electron/update-config.baked.json dist-electron/electron/update-config.baked.json
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && node scripts/bake-update-config.mjs && npm run build:electron && cp electron/update-config.baked.json dist-electron/electron/update-config.baked.json && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win portable --x64 --publish never
